title: selago subspinosa
intro: Selago subspinosa, also known as Cape pegtop, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Selago subspinosa has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Selago subspinosa is often used as a dried herb or infused in tea, and it is also used in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
